sql.if: AND (c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHURCH c
AND c.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS name, c.denomination AS denomination, c.region_id AS region_id, r.name AS region_name, c.address AS address, c.phone AS phone, c.pastor_name AS pastor_name, c.facilities AS facilities, c.latitude AS latitude, c.longitude AS longitude, c.thumbnail_key AS thumbnail_key, c.data_source AS data_source FROM CHURCH c LEFT JOIN REGION r ON c.region_id = r.id
AND c.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.latitude IS NOT NULL AND c.longitude IS NOT NULL AND c.latitude BETWEEN #{minLat} AND #{maxLat} AND c.longitude BETWEEN #{minLng} AND #{maxLng}

SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS name, c.denomination AS denomination, c.region_id AS region_id, r.name AS region_name, c.address AS address, c.address_detail AS address_detail, c.zipcode AS zipcode, c.phone AS phone, c.pastor_name AS pastor_name, c.facilities AS facilities, c.introduction AS introduction, c.homepage_url AS homepage_url, c.latitude AS latitude, c.longitude AS longitude, c.thumbnail_key AS thumbnail_key, c.data_source AS data_source, c.open_yn AS open_yn, c.use_yn AS use_yn, c.created_at AS created_at, c.updated_at AS updated_at FROM CHURCH c LEFT JOIN REGION r ON c.region_id = r.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
